titleStmt.title: SII 34.359: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 359. Kunnāṇḍārkōyil, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the cross wall of the east prākāra in the Parvatagirīśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Sundarapāṇḍya, 12th year = c. 13th-14th Century.

This is an undertaking given to the trustees of the Kuṉṟāṇḍār temple by the araiyars of Iraṇḍumalai-nāḍu that during the times of enmity and fighting among themselves they will in no way harass and injure the tenants and other inhabitants in the village and also the travellers on the roads, which they have been guarding. If they do not keep this promise, they were bound to pay a fine of hundred paṇam individually and 500 paṇam for the whole village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOṟcaṭaipaṉma tirupuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tE
vaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 2 vatu kāttikai mātam jeyaciṅka kulakāla vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭapaṉa
ṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirukkuṉṟākkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār kōil tāṉattu muta
likaḷukku Iṉṉāṭṭu Iraṇṭu malai nāṭṭu Araiyakaḷōm Eṅkaḷil Icaintu
piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu nāṅkaḷ pakai koṇṭu Eyyumiṭattu Eṅkaḷ kāval
Āṉa Ūrkaḷ vaḻinaṭaik kuṭimakkaḷ Iṭaikuṭi makkaḷ Ivarkaḷai Aḻivu cey
yakkaṭavōmalla vākavum Oruvaṉ Aḻivuceyyil nūṟupaṇam teṇṭam
vaikkavum Oru Ūrāka Aḻivuceyyil Añnūṟu paṇam vaikkavum kaṭavatākavum
Ippaṭi ceyyum Iṭattu veṭṭiyum kuttiyum cettu nōkka kaṭavarkaḷākavum §
Digital edition of SII 34.359 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
